name: Tamron SP 35mm f/1.4 Di USD
description: In celebration of Tamron's 40th anniversary of the SP lens series, the Nikon F-mount SP 35mm f/1.4 Di USD has been created to showcase their lens-making capabilities.

features.Key Features:: F-Mount Lens/FX Format | Aperture Range: f/1.4 to f/16 | Four Low Dispersion Elements | Three Aspherical Elements | BBAR-G2 and Fluorine Coatings | USD AF Motor and Dynamic Rolling Cam | Electromagnetic Diaphragm | Rounded 9-Blade Diaphragm | Compatible with TAP-in Console
